Correct answer: B
Solution

(b)

Correct answer: C
Solution

(c)

Correct answer: C

Solution

(b)

Correct answer: C
Solution

(c)

Q8 Not checked
Technical • MECHANICAL ENGINEERING • +1 / -0.33
Not attempted

A 50 kg piston in a cylinder with area of cross-section 0.008 m2 is loaded with a linear spring and the outside atmospheric pressure of 100 kPa as shown in the figure. The spring exerts no force on the piston when it is at the bottom of the cylinder and for the state shown, the pressure is 400 kPa with volume 0.4L. The valve is opened to let some air in, causing the piston to rise 2 cm. Find the new pressure. Assume g = 10 m/s2.

Correct answer: B
Solution

(b)

Correct answer: B
Solution

(b)

Technical • MECHANICAL ENGINEERING • +1 / -0
Not attempted

A mixture of ideal gases consists of 2 kmol of nitrogen and 3 kmol of carbon dioxide at a pressure of 300 kPa. The partial pressure of nitrogen (in kPa) is _______.

NAT
Correct answer: 120 (120 - 120)
Solution

Q11 Not checked
Technical • MECHANICAL ENGINEERING • +1 / -0
Not attempted

A rigid vessel with a partition in it, contains initially 2 kg of dry and saturated steam at 7 bar in one compartment and 1 kg of steam with dryness fraction of 0.8 at 3.5 bar in the other compartment. After the partition is removed, the pressure of the mixture is found to be 5 bar. The dryness fraction of final mixture is _______.

(Correct upto two decimal place)
Properties of steam

(Neglect the volume of liquid phase)

NAT
Correct answer: 0.86 (0.85 - 0.87)
Solution

0.86 (0.85 - 0.87)

Q12 Not checked
Technical • MECHANICAL ENGINEERING • +1 / -0
Not attempted

Air in reversible polytropic process (n = 1.5) undergoes change in state from 23°C to 103°C. The change in entropy of air (in J/kgK) is ______.

(Correct to one decimal place)

NAT
Correct answer: 34.3 (34.0 - 35.0)
Solution

34.3 (34.0 - 35.0)

Q13 Not checked
Technical • MECHANICAL ENGINEERING • +1 / -0
Not attempted

The resistance of the windings in a certain motor is found to be 100Ω at a room temperature of 27°C. When operating at full load under steady conditions the resistance of windings is found to be 120 Ω the windings are made of copper wire, whose resistance at t°C is given by R0 = R0(1 + 0.004t), where R0 is the resistance at 0°C and t is in degree celsius. The temperature attained by the coil during full load is ______°C. (Correct upto one decimal place)

NAT
Correct answer: 82.4 (81 - 83)
Solution

82.4 (81 - 83)

Solution

The properties of air cp = 1.005 kJ/kgK; R = 0.287 kJ/kgK. The heat addition per cycle is

Correct answer: A
Solution

(a)

Correct answer: A
Solution

(a)

Correct answer: A
Solution

(a)

Correct answer: A
Solution

(a)

Q21 Not checked
Technical • MECHANICAL ENGINEERING • +2 / -0.66
Not attempted

A refrigerator works on carnot cycle between –8°C and 35°C with a motor-compressor of 750 W. It makes ice cubes out of a tray of 0.25 kg liquid water at 10°C and ice is stored at –5°C. The time required for ice making is _____. Take specific heat of water and ice are 4.2 kJ/kgK and 2.1 kJ/kgK respectively. Latent heat = 330 kJ/kg.

Correct answer: D
Solution

(d)

Not attempted

Take, specific heats ratio as 1.3, gas constant as 0.2654 kJ/kgK and specific heat at constant pressure as 1.15 kJ/kgK.

Correct answer: A
Solution

(a)

Correct answer: 6.21 (6.00 - 6.40)
Solution

Technical • MECHANICAL ENGINEERING • +2 / -0

NAT
Correct answer: 800.56 (797 - 803)
Solution

800.56 (797 - 803)

Solution

Q26 Not checked
Technical • MECHANICAL ENGINEERING • +2 / -0
Not attempted

A heat engine operates between the minimum and maximum temperature of 30°C and 1000°C respectively, with the efficiency of 50% of its carnot efficiency. It drives a reversible heat pump which uses river water at 5°C to heat a block of flats in which temperature is to be maintained at 22°C. Assume that the temperature difference of 11°C exist between the working fluid and the river water, on one hand, and the required room temperature on the other hand. The heat input to the engine per unit heat output from the heat pump is _____. (Correct upto 2 decimal places)

NAT
Correct answer: 0.33 (0.31 - 0.35)
Solution

0.33 (0.31 - 0.35)

NAT
Correct answer: 1.80 (1.60 - 2.00)
Solution

1.80 (1.60 - 2.00)

Solution

Correct answer: 3454 (3450 - 3458)
Solution

Q30 Not checked
Technical • MECHANICAL ENGINEERING • +2 / -0

Steam (100 kg/s) at 2.5 MPa and 300°C is expands in turbine to 0.05 MPa, at the exit of the turbine, steam is dry saturated. The total entropy generation within the turbine is _______ kW/K. (Round off to the nearest integer properties at inlet and exit are given below).

NAT
Correct answer: 110 (105 - 115)
Solution

110 (105 - 115)

The change in internal energy is ______ kJ. (Round off to the nearest integer)

NAT
Correct answer: -87 (-88 - -86)
Solution
